Title: xCart — getSavedForLater Query — Full Field Selection Including configurationItems
Preconditions: Runner-native. Queries user's save-for-later cart. Field selection MUST include configurationItems to verify A2 fix (VCST-4205): SFL fragments omitting configurationItems caused configurable products to display master variation properties instead of user-selected configuration. Returns null or empty cart if user has no SFL items — both are acceptable.
Assertions: [ERRORS label=get_sfl] errors[] empty
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] data.getSavedForLater is non-null (returns a cart even if empty) OR null if user has never used save-for-later — both acceptable. KEY: configurationItems field in query MUST be accepted without GraphQL schema error. A schema error on configurationItems proves A2 fix (VCST-4205) is incomplete — the SFL fragment does not expose this field.
Failure_Signals: HTTP 500; unhandled exception; stack trace leaks; GraphQL error on configurationItems field selection (A2 fix not complete); configurationItems field absent from response schema
Cleanup: none — read-only
References: xAPI; graphql-schema.md — Query.getSavedForLater; Synced: VCST-4205 (2026-05-19) — updated field selection to include configurationItems (Anomaly A2 root-cause fix verification); technique: Error Guessing

[DATA label=move_to_sfl] data.moveToSavedForLater.list.id is non-null

[DATA label=read_sfl] data.getSavedForLater is non-null
[COUNT label=read_sfl] data.getSavedForLater.itemsCount >= 1
[DATA label=read_sfl] data.getSavedForLater.items.0.configurationItems is non-null
[DATA label=read_sfl] data.getSavedForLater.items.0.configurationItems.0.customText is non-null
Cross_Layer_Checks: [ROUNDTRIP label=read_sfl] configurationItems.0.customText value is non-null after SFL round-trip (A2 fix verified at GraphQL layer: fragment includes configurationItems). [EVIDENCE] Capture read_sfl response; confirm items[0].configurationItems[0].customText is non-null — if null/absent, Anomaly A2 fix is incomplete in current build.
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty on move_to_sfl; getSavedForLater.items empty (nothing moved); configurationItems null or absent from SFL item (A2 not fixed); HTTP 500

Title: xCart — moveFromSavedForLater Returns Configurable Item with Preserved configurationItems (Round-Trip)
Preconditions: Runner-native. VCST-4205 CASE2 promoted to regression. Seeds a configurable Text-section item (CFG_RING) into SFL via addItem+moveToSavedForLater, captures SAVED_0_ID+SAVED_0_TEXT at index 0, moves that item back to default cart via moveFromSavedForLater, reads cart and asserts configurationItems.0.customText equals captured SAVED_0_TEXT. Cross-variable roundtrip: text value must survive the full SFL cycle. Cleanup clears both carts.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=move_to_sfl] errors[] empty
[DATA label=read_sfl_before] data.getSavedForLater.items.0.id is non-null
[DATA label=read_sfl_before] data.getSavedForLater.items.0.configurationItems.0.customText is non-null
[ERRORS label=move_from_sfl] errors[] empty
[DATA label=move_from_sfl] data.moveFromSavedForLater.cart.id is non-null
[COUNT label=move_from_sfl] data.moveFromSavedForLater.cart.itemsCount >= 1
[DATA label=move_from_sfl] data.moveFromSavedForLater.cart.items.0.configurationItems is non-null
[DATA label=move_from_sfl] data.moveFromSavedForLater.cart.items.0.configurationItems.0.customText = {{SAVED_0_TEXT}}
[COUNT label=read_sfl_after] data.getSavedForLater.itemsCount >= 0
Cross_Layer_Checks: [ROUNDTRIP label=move_from_sfl] Cross-variable roundtrip: configurationItems.0.customText on the returned cart item MUST equal SAVED_0_TEXT captured from SFL before the move. This proves configurationItems survive both directions of the SFL round-trip at the GraphQL layer. NOTE: read_sfl_after.itemsCount >= 0 (may be 0 if single item; A3 bulk behavior means all items may have moved — assertion relaxed from strict count).
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty on move_from_sfl; returned cart item has null configurationItems (A4 not fixed — async settle overwrote payload); configurationItems.0.customText does not match SAVED_0_TEXT (round-trip data corruption); HTTP 500 on any operation
Cleanup: clearCart on both default and Saved for later carts at end of run
References: xAPI; VCST-4205 CASE2 (sprint CSV promoted); Anomaly A4 (async-settle configurationItems overwrite — this case will FAIL if A4 not fixed); BL-CART-014; BL-CART-018; technique: State Transition (SFL round-trip with cross-variable capture); Synced: VCST-4205 (2026-05-19)

Title: xCart — Identical Configurable Items Added Twice Produce Distinct Line Items (No Consolidation)
Preconditions: Runner-native. VCST-4205 CASE6 restated. Confirms that configurable products NEVER consolidate into a single line item even when the same configurationSections payload is submitted twice via addItem. Each addItem with configurationSections MUST produce a NEW distinct line item. Assertion: after 2 addItem calls with identical Text-section values, cart contains 2 line items each with quantity=1 (NOT 1 item with quantity=2). This is the correct behavior per BL-CART-007 exception clause — configurable products always create separate lines.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=add_first] errors[] empty
[ERRORS label=add_second] errors[] empty
[COUNT label=read_back] data.unSelectAllCartItems.itemsCount = 2
[COUNT label=read_back] data.unSelectAllCartItems.items.0.quantity = 1
[COUNT label=read_back] data.unSelectAllCartItems.items.1.quantity = 1
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] Two distinct line items, each with quantity=1 and identical configurationItems.0.customText. itemsCount=2 proves NO consolidation of configurable items even with identical configuration payload. This IS the correct behavior per BL-CART-007 exception (configurable products create separate lines). NOTE: Sprint-CSV CASE6 originally asserted itemsCount=1/qty=2 — that was an authoring error; this case restates the correct contract.
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty; itemsCount=1 with quantity=2 (incorrect consolidation — configurable items MUST NOT consolidate); items.length != 2; items[0] or items[1] missing configurationItems; HTTP 500
Cleanup: clearCart on default cart at end of run
References: xAPI; VCST-4205 CASE6 restated (sprint CSV had wrong assertion — consolidated expected vs actual distinct lines); BL-CART-007 (exception clause: configurable products always produce separate lines); technique: Error Guessing (consolidation assumption); Synced: VCST-4205 (2026-05-19)

Title: xCart — Bulk moveToSavedForLater (2 Items in One Call)
Preconditions: Runner-native. Verifies that moveToSavedForLater accepts MULTIPLE lineItemIds in a single call and BOTH items appear in SFL after the move. Uses 2 Ring (CFG_RING) line items with distinct customText values to ensure both round-tripped without collision. Bulk semantics are otherwise untested at the GraphQL layer.
Steps:
[AUTH role=ORG_USER]
[GQL-OP setup_me]
  query { me { id } }
[GQL-EXEC setup_me]
[GQL-CAPTURE setup_me.data.me.id → USER_ID]
[GQL-OP pre_clear_default]
  mutation { clearCart(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" cartName: "default" }) { id } }
[GQL-EXEC pre_clear_default]
[GQL-CAPTURE pre_clear_default.data.clearCart.id → CART_ID]
[GQL-OP pre_clear_sfl]
  mutation { clearCart(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" cartName: "Saved for later" }) { id } }
[GQL-EXEC pre_clear_sfl]
[GQL-OP add_first]
  mutation { addItem(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" cartName: "default" productId: "{{ring_id}}" quantity: 1 configurationSections: [{ sectionId: "@td(CFG_017_SECTIONS.Text)" type: "Text" customText: "{{text_a}}" }] }) { id itemsCount } }
[GQL-EXEC add_first]
[GQL-OP add_second]
  mutation { addItem(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" cartName: "default" productId: "{{ring_id}}" quantity: 1 configurationSections: [{ sectionId: "@td(CFG_017_SECTIONS.Text)" type: "Text" customText: "{{text_b}}" }] }) { id itemsCount } }
[GQL-EXEC add_second]
[GQL-OP capture_lines]
  mutation { unSelectAllCartItems(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" cartName: "default" }) { id itemsCount items { id } } }
[GQL-EXEC capture_lines]
[GQL-CAPTURE capture_lines.data.unSelectAllCartItems.items.0.id → LINE_ID_0]
[GQL-CAPTURE capture_lines.data.unSelectAllCartItems.items.1.id → LINE_ID_1]
[GQL-OP reselect]
  mutation { selectAllCartItems(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" cartName: "default" }) { id } }
[GQL-EXEC reselect]
[GQL-OP bulk_move]
  mutation { moveToSavedForLater(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" cartId: "{{CART_ID}}" lineItemIds: ["{{LINE_ID_0}}" "{{LINE_ID_1}}"] }) { cart { id itemsCount } list { id itemsCount } } }
[GQL-EXEC bulk_move]
[GQL-OP read_sfl]
  query { getSavedForLater(storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" currencyCode: "USD") { id itemsCount items { id productId configurationItems { sectionId customText } } } }
[GQL-EXEC read_sfl]
[GQL-OP cleanup_default]
  mutation { clearCart(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" cartName: "default" }) { id } }
[GQL-EXEC cleanup_default]
[GQL-OP cleanup_sfl]
  mutation { clearCart(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" cartName: "Saved for later" }) { id } }
[GQL-EXEC cleanup_sfl]
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=bulk_move] errors[] empty
[DATA label=bulk_move] data.moveToSavedForLater.list.id is non-null
[COUNT label=bulk_move] data.moveToSavedForLater.list.itemsCount >= 2
[ERRORS label=read_sfl] errors[] empty
[COUNT label=read_sfl] data.getSavedForLater.itemsCount >= 2
[DATA label=read_sfl] data.getSavedForLater.items.0.configurationItems is non-null
[DATA label=read_sfl] data.getSavedForLater.items.1.configurationItems is non-null
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] Both line IDs moved in a single mutation call; SFL contains both items with their respective customText values; cart is empty (or itemsCount decreased by 2)
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty on bulk_move; only one item moved (silent partial success); list.itemsCount < 2; configurationItems missing on either item
Cleanup: clearCart on both default and Saved for later carts at end of run
References: xAPI; bulk SFL coverage gap (BL-CART-014, BL-CART-018); technique: BVA (lineItemIds count > 1); Added: 2026-05-20

Title: xCart — Multi-Section Configurable (Product+Product+Product+Text+File) Survives SFL Round-Trip
Preconditions: Runner-native. Uses CFG-023 Wedding Cake — the only fixture covering ALL three ConfigurationSectionInput section types in one product: 3 Product sections (Base required + Creme + Message), 1 REQUIRED Text section, 1 optional File section. Adds the full chain, captures the line, moves it to SFL via moveToSavedForLater, reads SFL, moves it BACK via moveFromSavedForLater, and asserts all 5 sections survive both directions with their sectionId/type/customText/product mapping preserved.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=add_multi] errors[] empty
[COUNT label=add_multi] data.addItem.itemsCount = 1
[COUNT label=add_multi] data.addItem.items.0.configurationItems.length = 5
[ERRORS label=move_to_sfl] errors[] empty
[DATA label=move_to_sfl] data.moveToSavedForLater.list.id is non-null
[COUNT label=move_to_sfl] data.moveToSavedForLater.list.itemsCount >= 1
[ERRORS label=read_sfl_before] errors[] empty
[COUNT label=read_sfl_before] data.getSavedForLater.items.0.configurationItems.length = 5
[ERRORS label=move_from_sfl] errors[] empty
[DATA label=move_from_sfl] data.moveFromSavedForLater.cart.items.0.configurationItems is non-null
[COUNT label=move_from_sfl] data.moveFromSavedForLater.cart.items.0.configurationItems.length = 5
[DATA label=move_from_sfl] data.moveFromSavedForLater.cart.items.0.configurationItems[?type=Text].customText = AGENT-TEST-CAKE-MULTI
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] addItem accepted all 5 sections; configurationItems[].length = 5 throughout the SFL round-trip (cart → SFL → cart); customText on the Text section (index 3, dep Message) preserved; Product-type sections retain their option product IDs
Failure_Signals: add_multi rejected (required section missing OR schema mismatch); configurationItems.length < 5 at any stage (section dropped during async settle); customText null after round-trip (Anomaly A4 unfixed for multi-section); HTTP 500
Cleanup: clearCart on both default and Saved for later carts at end of run
References: xAPI; Multi-section configurable SFL coverage gap (BL-CART-014, BL-CART-018); CFG-023 Wedding Cake fixture (5 sections P+P+P+T+F); technique: State Transition (multi-section SFL round-trip); Added: 2026-05-20

Title: xCart — Required Section Omission Rejected (Negative)

[COUNT label=read_cart] data.unSelectAllCartItems.itemsCount = 0
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] After submitting an addItem that omits the required Base section, the cart MUST remain empty (itemsCount=0). Either the server returned errors[] OR silently dropped the invalid line item — both protect cart integrity. NOTE: the assertion intentionally tolerates either outcome (errors-or-empty-cart) because the contract may evolve; the invariant is cart-must-stay-empty.
Failure_Signals: unSelectAllCartItems.itemsCount > 0 (invalid configuration accepted); cart contains a CFG-023 line item without the required Base section; HTTP 500
Cleanup: clearCart on default cart at end of run
References: xAPI; required-section validation coverage gap (BL-CART-014); CFG-023 Base section; technique: Negative testing (Error Guessing); Added: 2026-05-20

Title: xCart — Bulk SFL with Mixed CFG Items (Ring + Wedding Cake)
Preconditions: Runner-native. Combines bulk + multi-section. Adds 2 different configurable products (Ring with Text section + Wedding Cake with all 5 sections), moves BOTH to SFL in a single bulk call. Verifies both line items appear in SFL with their respective configurationItems counts (1 for Ring, 5 for Cake) and their type identities preserved.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=add_ring] errors[] empty
[ERRORS label=add_cake] errors[] empty
[ERRORS label=bulk_move] errors[] empty
[COUNT label=bulk_move] data.moveToSavedForLater.list.itemsCount >= 2
[ERRORS label=read_sfl] errors[] empty
[COUNT label=read_sfl] data.getSavedForLater.itemsCount >= 2
[DATA label=read_sfl] data.getSavedForLater.items.0.configurationItems is non-null
[DATA label=read_sfl] data.getSavedForLater.items.1.configurationItems is non-null
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] Both items move in a single bulk call; SFL contains 2 items with mixed configurationItems shapes (1 section for Ring, 5 sections for Cake); no cross-contamination between the two items' configs
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty on bulk_move; one item missing in SFL (silent partial success); configurationItems.length wrong for either item (collision/swap); HTTP 500
Cleanup: clearCart on both default and Saved for later carts at end of run
References: xAPI; bulk + multi-section SFL coverage gap (BL-CART-014, BL-CART-018); technique: Combinatorial (bulk × multi-section); Added: 2026-05-20
